headline: Dark-blue, neon-lit builds.
subheadline: A portfolio that moves like tape on a pole.
heroDescription: Scroll, swipe, or tap through the floating showcase.
aboutText: I’m a frontend developer who builds responsive, high-quality websites and web apps. My focus is performance, usability, and elegant interfaces combining strong engineering with design polish to deliver products that look great and work reliably.
aboutSpanishLine: Construyo experiencias web claras, rápidas y confiables. ✨
clientsText: Clean, responsive pages, smooth interactions, and performance-first code  built to look premium and convert.
